visa_types.name: Airport Transit
visa_types.documents_required:
Sweden Visa Application Form - English
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Document checklist for airport transit (Pakistan residents) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3q7wCxSWwdlXbu5xwg4tR1/067893510acb5d4ed22e7ba816782ec2/Airport-Transit-New.pdf) 
Valid Travel Insurance from the list of approved insurance companies in Pakistan (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7bXHQfGNhGYGPLPgBNNMbn/6bdbfdf866cf2c184d756dd4c5cdfad1/List-of-Insurance-Companies-from-June-2025_updated.pdf) 
The Sweden Migration Agency will only accept Schengen visa application forms and supporting documents in A4 size paper. The forms must be completed in English or Swedish. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Business]
Please note: 
- The applicable visa fee in Pakistan Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. Fees must be paid at Gerry’s cash counters and are subject to change without prior notice.
- Children below 6 years of age are exempted from visa fees for short-stay Schengen visa to Sweden.
- All fees should be paid in advance and are non-refundable.
- A service charge of EUR 24 is levied per application in addition to the visa fee.
- The above fees are effective from 07 July 2025.
visa_types.processing_time: Applications will be processed within 2 weeks of the Embassy receiving the application.
visa_types.forms:
If you wish to apply for a Swedish Visa, you can download the Visa Application Form here. 
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6TG3jI8hxTDdEobKMXnrhX/b237cc0b7fecb0e9f2a0ea406b178b4b/sweden-application-form-eng.pdf) English 
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3LyUnAGc4iNTPL4lPb8boY/8e230624470b1635ee7985b835792557/sweden-application-form-sv.pdf) Swedish
visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you wish to transit through the airport of Sweden you must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Sweden.
For more Information and to view list of countries whose citizens need a visa to enter Sweden: Click Do  I Need A visa (https://www.government.se/government-policy/migration-and-asylum/list-of-foreign-citizens-who-require-visa-for-entry-into-sweden/)
Please click on the tabs above for the required information.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you wish to transit through the airport of Sweden you must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Sweden.
For more Information and to view list of countries whose citizens need a visa to enter Sweden: Click Do  I Need A visa (https://www.government.se/government-policy/migration-and-asylum/list-of-foreign-citizens-who-require-visa-for-entry-into-sweden/)
Please click on the tabs above for the required information.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Business]
Please note: 
- The applicable visa fee in Pakistan Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. Fees must be paid at Gerry’s cash counters and are subject to change without prior notice.
- Children below 6 years of age are exempted from visa fees for short-stay Schengen visa to Sweden.
- All fees should be paid in advance and are non-refundable.
- A service charge of EUR 24 is levied per application in addition to the visa fee.
- The above fees are effective from 07 July 2025.

## Documents Required
Sweden Visa Application Form - English
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Document checklist for airport transit (Pakistan residents) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3q7wCxSWwdlXbu5xwg4tR1/067893510acb5d4ed22e7ba816782ec2/Airport-Transit-New.pdf) 
Valid Travel Insurance from the list of approved insurance companies in Pakistan (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7bXHQfGNhGYGPLPgBNNMbn/6bdbfdf866cf2c184d756dd4c5cdfad1/List-of-Insurance-Companies-from-June-2025_updated.pdf) 
The Sweden Migration Agency will only accept Schengen visa application forms and supporting documents in A4 size paper. The forms must be completed in English or Swedish. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator.

## Photo Specifications
From 8 June 2016 applicants are not required to submit any photographs with their application as a digital photograph will be captured as part of the biometrics procedure.  Click
                                                                     here (http://www.vfsglobal.se/pakistan/biometric_data_collection.html) for more information on biometrics.

## Processing Time
Applications will be processed within 2 weeks of the Embassy receiving the application.

## Download Forms
If you wish to apply for a Swedish Visa, you can download the Visa Application Form here. 
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6TG3jI8hxTDdEobKMXnrhX/b237cc0b7fecb0e9f2a0ea406b178b4b/sweden-application-form-eng.pdf) English 
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3LyUnAGc4iNTPL4lPb8boY/8e230624470b1635ee7985b835792557/sweden-application-form-sv.pdf) Swedish

## Overview
If you wish to visit Sweden for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Sweden.
For more Information and to view list of countries whose citizens need a visa to enter Sweden: Click Do I Need A visa (https://www.government.se/government-policy/migration-and-asylum/list-of-foreign-citizens-who-require-visa-for-entry-into-sweden/)
Please click on the tabs above for the required information.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Business]
Please note: 
- The applicable visa fee in Pakistan Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. Fees must be paid at Gerry’s cash counters and are subject to change without prior notice.
- Children below 6 years of age are exempted from visa fees for short-stay Schengen visa to Sweden.
- All fees should be paid in advance and are non-refundable.
- A service charge of EUR 24 is levied per application in addition to the visa fee.
- The above fees are effective from 07 July 2025.

## Documents Required

## Download Forms
If you wish to apply for a Swedish Visa, you can download the Visa Application Form here.

visa_types.name: EU Family Members
visa_types.documents_required:
Sweden Visa Application Form - English
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
All family members of an EU or EEA national applying for a visa must submit the following obligatory supporting documents at the appointment at Gerry’s, or at the Embassy:
- Schengen Visa Application (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/16yHmz3U5uXXhsTi0J1m59/1444f9eb76ecdefb203eb181d0be7d75/Application-for-Schengen-Visa-Updated.pdf)
- Your passport or travel document. Make sure that your passport has at least two blank pages.
- Proof of relation, eg.marriage certificate or birth certificate.
- Copy of the EU/EEA national's passport or national identity card
- If you are a dependent family member you must submit documents showing your dependence.
- Document(s) to show the right of residence of the EU/EEA national (e.g. work contract)
Please note that a family member of an EU or EEA citizen does NOT pay an application fee for Schengen visa. Service charge is paid at Gerry’s.

In addition to the documents listed above there might be, depending on the EU/ EES-citizen’s circumstances, some additional documents required showing your family member’s situation.
- If your family member is settled in Sweden you must provide their “Personbevis” from the tax office.
- If your family member is a EU/EES-citizen you must also provide documents showing your family member fulfil the criteria for having a right to residence in Sweden in accordance with the regulations in Directive 2004/38/EC. These documents could, depending on the situation, be a work contract and pay slips, a study certificate or documents showing your family member has sufficient income or bank assets to support themselves.
It is generally not necessary to submit any other documents, although the Embassy strongly recommends that you always travel with valid travel insurance.
visa_types.visa_fees: Please note that a family member of an EU or EEA citizen does NOT pay an application fee for Schengen visa, however all visa applicants applying at VFS Gerry's must pay a service fee of EUR 9 charged in Pakistan Rupees.
visa_types.processing_time: When you submit your application, you are given a receipt with information of when you can collect the decision and your passport.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
As a family member of an EU/EEA citizen exercising their right of free movement in accordance with Directive 2004/38/EC you have the right to travel to the EU/EEA-area together with your
                                                                        family member or join to them in the area to settle there.
Please note that Swedish citizen living in Sweden are NOT exercising EU treaty rights and they do NOT therefore hold a right of residence based on Directive 2004/38/EC
                                                                        in their home country, unless they have recently moved back to Sweden from another EU/EEA country.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
As a family member of an EU/EEA citizen exercising their right of free movement in accordance with Directive 2004/38/EC you have the right to travel to the EU/EEA-area together with your
                                                                        family member or join to them in the area to settle there.
Please note that Swedish citizen living in Sweden are NOT exercising EU treaty rights and they do NOT therefore hold a right of residence based on Directive 2004/38/EC
                                                                        in their home country, unless they have recently moved back to Sweden from another EU/EEA country.

## Family members are:
- Spouse/partner/common law spouse
- The direct descendants (children) who are under the age of 21 or are dependents, and those of the spouse or partner.
- The dependent direct relatives in the ascending line (e.g. parents) and those of the spouse or partner

## Basic facts
You can apply for a short-stay Schengen visa (type C) which will permit you to enter and stay in Sweden and the Schengen area for up to 90 days.
In the event that you wish to remain in the State for more than 90 days as a family member of an EU/EEA citizen exercising their free movement rights, you must apply (when in the Member
                                                                        State) for a Residence Card of a family member of a EU/EEA citizen. Information about how to apply is available on the Swedish Migration Agency's website (https://www.migrationsverket.se/English/Private-individuals/EU-citizens-and-long-term-residents/Work-study-or-live-in-Sweden-for-EU-citizens/Right-of-residence-for-family-who-are-EU-citizens.html).

## More information
Directive 2004/38/EC  (http://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?qid=1487136010527&uri=CELEX%3A32004L0038)
Swedish Migration Agency on EES family members  (https://www.migrationsverket.se/English/Private-individuals/EU-citizens-and-long-term-residents.html)

## Visa Fees
Please note that a family member of an EU or EEA citizen does NOT pay an application fee for Schengen visa, however all visa applicants applying at VFS Gerry's must pay a service fee of EUR 9 charged in Pakistan Rupees.

## Documents Required
Sweden Visa Application Form - English
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
All family members of an EU or EEA national applying for a visa must submit the following obligatory supporting documents at the appointment at Gerry’s, or at the Embassy:
- Schengen Visa Application (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/16yHmz3U5uXXhsTi0J1m59/1444f9eb76ecdefb203eb181d0be7d75/Application-for-Schengen-Visa-Updated.pdf)
- Your passport or travel document. Make sure that your passport has at least two blank pages.
- Proof of relation, eg.marriage certificate or birth certificate.
- Copy of the EU/EEA national's passport or national identity card
- If you are a dependent family member you must submit documents showing your dependence.
- Document(s) to show the right of residence of the EU/EEA national (e.g. work contract)
Please note that a family member of an EU or EEA citizen does NOT pay an application fee for Schengen visa. Service charge is paid at Gerry’s.

## Additional documents
In addition to the documents listed above there might be, depending on the EU/ EES-citizen’s circumstances, some additional documents required showing your family member’s situation.
- If your family member is settled in Sweden you must provide their “Personbevis” from the tax office.
- If your family member is a EU/EES-citizen you must also provide documents showing your family member fulfil the criteria for having a right to residence in Sweden in accordance with the regulations in Directive 2004/38/EC. These documents could, depending on the situation, be a work contract and pay slips, a study certificate or documents showing your family member has sufficient income or bank assets to support themselves.
It is generally not necessary to submit any other documents, although the Embassy strongly recommends that you always travel with valid travel insurance.

## Photo Specifications
From 8 June 2016 applicants are not required to submit any photographs with their application as a digital photograph will be captured as part of the biometrics procedure.  Click
                                                                     here (http://www.vfsglobal.se/pakistan/biometric_data_collection.html) for more information on biometrics.

## Processing Time
When you submit your application, you are given a receipt with information of when you can collect the decision and your passport.

Valid Travel Insurance from the list of approved insurance companies in Pakistan (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7bXHQfGNhGYGPLPgBNNMbn/6bdbfdf866cf2c184d756dd4c5cdfad1/List-of-Insurance-Companies-from-June-2025_updated.pdf) 
The Sweden Migration Agency will only accept Schengen visa application forms and supporting documents in A4 size paper. The forms must be completed in English or Swedish. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you wish to visit Sweden for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Sweden.
For more Information and to view list of countries whose citizens need a visa to enter Sweden: Click Do I Need A visa (https://www.government.se/government-policy/migration-and-asylum/list-of-foreign-citizens-who-require-visa-for-entry-into-sweden/)
Please click on the tabs above for the required information.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you wish to visit Sweden for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Sweden.
For more Information and to view list of countries whose citizens need a visa to enter Sweden: Click Do I Need A visa (https://www.government.se/government-policy/migration-and-asylum/list-of-foreign-citizens-who-require-visa-for-entry-into-sweden/)
Please click on the tabs above for the required information.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Business]
Please note: 
- The applicable visa fee in Pakistan Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. Fees must be paid at Gerry’s cash counters and are subject to change without prior notice.
- Children below 6 years of age are exempted from visa fees for short-stay Schengen visa to Sweden.
- All fees should be paid in advance and are non-refundable.
- A service charge of EUR 24 is levied per application in addition to the visa fee.
- The above fees are effective from 07 July 2025.

## Documents Required
Sweden Visa Application Form - English
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Tourism / Visiting Family and Friends document checklist (for Pakistan residents) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5sJIFPGriP1M4KDdQxjJqe/5aa39240f00ee636def3a698fa874f12/Tourism-or-Visiting-Family-and-Friends-for-Pakistan-New.pdf) 
Incentive Package Tours document checklist (for Pakistan residents) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/AUDJYPMKdArOjtskp0s1Q/e8c0667bc6a506d671918bc232734f62/VAC-Incentive-package-tours-New.pdf)
Invitation to be filled in by persons in Sweden (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6S73yEplqPdZHaVgqwjuwy/fba1a5f479116c0946d8aec1998e226f/241011-Invitation-form-Schengen-visa-Sep-2023.pdf) – click here (https://www.migrationsverket.se/English/Private-individuals/Visiting-Sweden/Inviting-relatives-and-friends.html) for more information about inviting a friend or family member to Sweden
Valid Travel Insurance from the list of approved insurance companies in Pakistan (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7bXHQfGNhGYGPLPgBNNMbn/6bdbfdf866cf2c184d756dd4c5cdfad1/List-of-Insurance-Companies-from-June-2025_updated.pdf) 
The Sweden Migration Agency will only accept Schengen visa application forms and supporting documents in A4 size paper. The forms must be completed in English or Swedish. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator.

## Photo Specifications
From 8 June 2016 applicants are not required to submit any photographs with their application as a digital photograph will be captured as part of the biometrics procedure.  Click
                                                                     here (http://www.vfsglobal.se/pakistan/biometric_data_collection.html) for more information on biometrics.

## Processing Time
Applications will be processed within 2 weeks of the Embassy receiving the application.

## Download Forms
If you wish to apply for a Swedish Visa, you can download the Visa Application Form here. 
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6TG3jI8hxTDdEobKMXnrhX/b237cc0b7fecb0e9f2a0ea406b178b4b/sweden-application-form-eng.pdf) English 
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3LyUnAGc4iNTPL4lPb8boY/8e230624470b1635ee7985b835792557/sweden-application-form-sv.pdf) Swedish

Business visa document requirements checklist (for residents of Pakistan) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/GzerAsebP6CIqubtcorZV/aa4cfbeb0cdf42deea7d162859199456/Business-visa-in-Pakistan-New.pdf) 
Valid Travel Insurance from the list of approved insurance companies in Pakistan (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5LChpAcq7DajbWkbYX6NVO/91dbab208dec9e8a16b415698c3d30d4/List-of-insurance-companies-Business-Updated.pdf) 
The Sweden Migration Agency will only accept Schengen visa application forms and supporting documents in A4 size paper. The forms must be completed in English or Swedish. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator.

For more Information and to view list of countries whose citizens need a visa to enter Sweden: Click Do I Need A visa (https://www.government.se/government-policy/migration-and-asylum/list-of-foreign-citizens-who-require-visa-for-entry-into-sweden/)

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you wish to visit Sweden for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Sweden.
For more Information and to view list of countries whose citizens need a visa to enter Sweden: Click Do I Need A visa (https://www.government.se/government-policy/migration-and-asylum/list-of-foreign-citizens-who-require-visa-for-entry-into-sweden/)
Please click on the tabs above for the required information.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Business]
Please note: 
- The applicable visa fee in Pakistan Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. Fees must be paid at Gerry’s cash counters and are subject to change without prior notice.
- Children below 6 years of age are exempted from visa fees for short-stay Schengen visa to Sweden.
- All fees should be paid in advance and are non-refundable.
- A service charge of EUR 24 is levied per application in addition to the visa fee.
- The above fees are effective from 07 July 2025.

## Documents Required
Sweden Visa Application Form - English
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Business visa document requirements checklist (for residents of Pakistan) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/GzerAsebP6CIqubtcorZV/aa4cfbeb0cdf42deea7d162859199456/Business-visa-in-Pakistan-New.pdf) 
Valid Travel Insurance from the list of approved insurance companies in Pakistan (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5LChpAcq7DajbWkbYX6NVO/91dbab208dec9e8a16b415698c3d30d4/List-of-insurance-companies-Business-Updated.pdf) 
The Sweden Migration Agency will only accept Schengen visa application forms and supporting documents in A4 size paper. The forms must be completed in English or Swedish. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator.

## Photo Specifications
From 8 June 2016 applicants are not required to submit any photographs with their application as a digital photograph will be captured as part of the biometrics procedure.  Click
                                                                     here (http://www.vfsglobal.se/pakistan/biometric_data_collection.html) for more information on biometrics.

## Processing Time
Applications will be processed within 2 weeks of the Embassy receiving the application.

## Download Forms
If you wish to apply for a Swedish Visa, you can download the Visa Application Form here. 
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6TG3jI8hxTDdEobKMXnrhX/b237cc0b7fecb0e9f2a0ea406b178b4b/sweden-application-form-eng.pdf) English 
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3LyUnAGc4iNTPL4lPb8boY/8e230624470b1635ee7985b835792557/sweden-application-form-sv.pdf) Swedish
